description:
### Install

**ReVanced Manager** (recommended):
1. Patches > Add > Enter URL > paste:
   `https://github.com/alim-zanibekov/ultrasandbox/releases/latest/download/patches.json`
2. Select app > enable UltraSandbox > Patch

**revanced-cli**:
```
java -jar revanced-cli.jar patch -p ultrasandbox-patches.rvp -b --force app.apk
```


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alim-zanibekov/ultrasandbox/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.4
